article_meta.title: Democracy Dies in DarknessPoliticsDonald TrumpWhite HouseDemocracy in AmericaCourts & LawNational SecurityElectionsPolit

reasoning: One clear attribution violation occurred by flagging quoted language as author bias, and the model missed several strong instances of bias in the author’s own prose (e.g., headline framing and an unattributed broader claim). Some labels are debatable but defensible.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: Flagged the quoted phrase “egregiously deviating from professional norms of policing” (attributed to Seth Stoughton), violating the attribution rule.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: One clear false positive from quoted text; another item (slant via expert selection) is somewhat speculative given the article includes a DHS defense and a former Border Patrol perspective.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed clear author-level bias: the headline phrase “raise red flags” (spin/word choice) and the unattributed broader claim that the incident “adds to a growing body of evidence” that officers are deviating from norms (opinion-as-fact/unsubstantiated).
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: “Negativity Bias” for the ‘militarized tactics’ sentence is arguable but might better fit Word Choice/Slant; the slant label about sourcing is debatable; the third item’s type is moot due to attribution error.
